{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Glasswater Sentinel
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Glasswater Sentinel]] is a transparent [[construct]] crafted by [[Soulsmith Serenity]] of the [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
